nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 大分水岭
nodes.summary: 大分水岭是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括White-throated nightjar、Powerful owl、绿宝石鹦鹉等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 凱恩斯 (昆士蘭州)
nodes.summary: 凱恩斯 (昆士蘭州)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Little lorikeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Little lorikeet
nodes.summary: Little lorikeet（Little lorikeet，学名 Psitteuteles pusillus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于凱恩斯 (昆士蘭州)、大分水岭。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The little lorikeet is found in eastern and southern Australia, from the vicinity of Cairns southwards through Queensland and New South Wales from the western slopes of the Great Dividing Range eastwards to the coast, through most of Victoria and southeastern South Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The little lorikeet is found in eastern and southern Australia, from the vicinity of Cairns southwards through Queensland and New South Wales from the western slopes of the Great Dividing Range eastwards to the coast, through most of Victoria and southeastern South Australia
